channel.title: Grok-Code-Fast-1 on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Grok-Code-Fast-1 on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: Upcoming deprecation of Grok Code Fast 1
item.description:
GitHub will deprecate Grok Code Fast 1 across all GitHub Copilot experiences on May 15, 2026. The deprecation applies to Copilot Chat, inline edits, ask and agent modes, and code completions.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Grok Code Fast 1 is now available in Copilot Free auto model selection
item.description:
GitHub Copilot Free’s auto model selection now includes Grok Code Fast 1, which is generally available.

  • Source: GitHub
